PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?team ?teamLabel(COUNT(?competition) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?team {
    wd:Q3174102 wd:Q2927468
  }
  ?team rdfs:label ?teamLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?teamLabel) = 'en')
  ?team wdt:P2522 ?competition .
  ?competition rdfs:label ?competitionLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?competitionLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?competitionLabel) , 'national championship'))
}
GROUP BY ?team ?teamLabel
